name: Creditsmon
description: The final boss that appears immediately after the credits roll, just when you thought it was over. You put the controller down. You started crying. The music was beautiful. Then the screen flashed and it appeared. It has a second phase. It always has a second phase. Its HP bar fills the entire screen. There is no save point nearby. You are not ready. You were never going to be ready.

moves.name: 💥 Second Phase
moves.desc: Gets destroyed, then immediately transforms into a more powerful form nobody saw coming. ATK and speed sharply rise. The music changes. The music is incredible. This is bad.

moves.name: 💾 No Save Point
moves.desc: Eliminates the nearest save point. The opponent realizes a loss means replaying the last 45 minutes. Defense crumbles under the weight of that information.

moves.name: ✨ Phase Transition
moves.desc: Dramatically floats into the air, becomes briefly invincible, and restores 25 HP during a cutscene the opponent cannot skip.

moves.name: 🌑 Arena Nuke
moves.desc: Fills the entire screen with projectiles. Statistically some of them will hit. Deals heavy damage while the opponent frantically tries to find a gap that may not exist.

moves.name: 🗣️ Villain Monologue
moves.desc: Delivers an unskippable 8-minute monologue about power and destiny. Sharply lowers opponent's speed as they age visibly waiting for it to end.

moves.name: 👁️ True Final Form
moves.desc: Reveals THIS was not the real form. The opponent is poisoned by exhaustion AND confused because the credits already rolled. This should be over. It is not over.
